hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today, your energy will be contagious. Make the most of it!
aries.love: Passion ignites as you connect with someone special.
aries.career: Collaborate with colleagues for unexpected breakthroughs.

taurus.general: Stability is key, focus on what makes you feel secure.
taurus.love: Expressing your feelings will strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Hard work pays off; prepare for recognition.

gemini.general: Conversations will flow effortlessly; embrace the dialogue.
gemini.love: A surprise awaits in your romantic life today.
gemini.career: Networking could lead to valuable opportunities.

cancer.general: Nurture your creative side; it's your time to shine.
cancer.love: Honesty in expressions will deepen your relationship.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts to guide your decisions.

leo.general: Your charisma will attract positive attention today.
leo.love: A revelation about your partner could change your outlook.
leo.career: Take the lead on projects; your vision is needed.

virgo.general: Organize your thoughts, clarity will lead to insights.
virgo.love: Work on communication to resolve misunderstandings.

libra.general: Balance is essential; find harmony in your surroundings.
libra.love: Partnerships thrive when you show appreciation.

scorpio.general: Introspection reveals hidden truths; embrace them.
scorpio.career: Your determination will lead to significant accomplishments.

sagittarius.love: A shared experience could bring you closer.
sagittarius.career: Look for opportunities that allow for growth.

capricorn.general: Focus on your goals; persistence will pay off.
capricorn.love: Support each other’s ambitions for a stronger bond.
capricorn.career: Strategic planning will yield long-term benefits.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas will inspire those around you.
aquarius.career: Unique solutions will set you apart from the crowd.

pisces.general: Tune into your emotions; they are your guide today.
pisces.love: Romance flourishes when you express your dreams.
pisces.career: Creative endeavors may lead to unexpected recognition.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Don't stop when you're tired. Stop when you're done.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: It's not whether you get knocked down, it's whether you get up.
motivation.author: Vince Lombardi

captions.text: Chase your dreams, not the competition.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
captions.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

captions.text: Be the energy you want to attract.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: You are the artist of your own life.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The measure of intelligence is the ability to change.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The future is already here – it's just not evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kat ads.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would tell you a joke about an elevator, but it's an uplifting experience.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It's a shame they'll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: What do you call a fake noodle? An impasta!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: For we walk by faith, not by sight.
faith.author: 2 Corinthians 5:7

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Taking a leap of faith is the first step in your journey.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards.
wisdom.author: Søren Kierkegaard

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: Beware of false knowledge; it is more dangerous than ignorance.
wisdom.author: George Bernard Shaw

wisdom.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act but a habit.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
